existingFeatureUpdates.change: Update description to emphasize British comedy tone specifically
existingFeatureUpdates.newDescription: A dialogue/text box system for NPC and object interactions featuring dry British absurdist comedy writing

existingFeatureUpdates.change: Update description to emphasize British comedy tone specifically
existingFeatureUpdates.newDescription: Populate the world with funny NPCs and interactable items featuring dry British humor and pop culture references

newFeatures.name: Scrolling camera with larger world map
newFeatures.description: Expand the tile map to be much larger than the viewport and implement a camera that scrolls to follow the player character as they walk off-screen
newFeatures.detailedDescription: The world should be significantly larger than the visible viewport. As the player walks toward the edge of the screen, the camera smoothly scrolls to reveal more of the world. The camera should center on the player and stop at world boundaries.

acceptanceCriteria.when: The full map dimensions are checked
acceptanceCriteria.then: The world is at least 3x the viewport size in both dimensions

acceptanceCriteria.given: The player is moving across the map
acceptanceCriteria.when: The character approaches the edge of the visible area
acceptanceCriteria.then: The camera smoothly scrolls to keep the player centered on screen

acceptanceCriteria.given: The player is near the edge of the world map
acceptanceCriteria.when: The camera would need to show area beyond the map
acceptanceCriteria.then: The camera stops scrolling and the player moves toward the screen edge instead

newFeatures.name: Mouse cursor sparkle trail
newFeatures.description: A decorative particle effect that follows the mouse cursor, emitting little stars or sparkles even though the mouse isn't used for gameplay
newFeatures.detailedDescription: Little stars or sparkles should follow the mouse cursor across the screen. This is purely decorative and adds to the whimsical 90s feel. The particles should fade out over time and not impact performance.

acceptanceCriteria.given: The game is running and the mouse is over the canvas
acceptanceCriteria.then: Small star/sparkle particles appear at the cursor position and trail behind it
The particles fade out and are removed, keeping the screen clean

acceptanceCriteria.given: The user is rapidly moving the mouse
acceptanceCriteria.then: The game maintains smooth frame rate with no noticeable lag
